text: Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You’ve been approved as a mentor. We’re glad to have you here—please review the mentoring resources and introduce yourself when you have a moment.
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You’ve been approved as a moderator. Please review the moderation guidelines and say hi in the team channels when you’re ready.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You’ve been approved as an event_helper. Thanks for pitching in—please check the event coordination notes and introduce yourself in welcome.
